Transcrição Completa: 3 How do I Know my Money is Safe
[00:00] Okay, the next objection, uh, how do I know my money's secure with your company?
[00:06] I like to think this question comes down to credibility and trust. You know, if the people can't trust you, there's a low probability they're going to do business with you.
[00:16] If you're a new business and there's not a shitload of information about you on Google that vouches for you, you're probably going to get this question a lot or technically this objection a lot.
[00:27] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Credibility Assets Strategy"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Conceito de ativos de credibilidade sendo apresentado como fundamento, ícones representando confiança e validação terceirizada
[00:29] What we want to have is called credibility assets. So, ideally, we have some press from credible institutions that we can send to people that are already in the search engines that they see.
[00:41] Ideally, our personal brand or whoever the founder is has gone on some podcast or some type of content spree also flooded the search engines with that kind of stuff.
[00:51] If you are a newer business and you don't have those things yet, we ideally will have some type of testimonial page.
[00:58] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Screenshot Testimonial Strategy"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Demonstração de captura de tela de depoimentos autênticos em plataformas originais, mantendo formato nativo para credibilidade
[01:00] To be clear, in my business, we take screenshots of testimonials as they come in on the platforms that they come in on.
[01:07] So, if we get a random Facebook comment, we will just screenshot it. We will not copy and paste what that person says and just paste it somewhere onto our site to make it look fancy. We'll literally just screenshot it.
[01:19] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Master Internet Marketing Example"
NÚMEROS: Never-ending list of testimonials
VISUAL: Página de depoimentos em formato de lista infinita, screenshots de estudantes reais do programa Master Internet Marketing, layout visual mostrando autenticidade
[01:21] So, here's an example of what we do for one of my information products called Master Internet Marketing. And you can see same kind of concept.
[01:29] It is a never-ending list of testimonials from students who have gone through that very program.
[01:35] So, to be clear, if somebody asks one of my salespeople, hey, how can I know that my money is secure with your company?
[01:42] Well, I can make sure once again that we give them a lot of credibility assets that vouches for the fact that we're legit and do everything correctly.
[01:51] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Independent Auditing Solutions"
NÚMEROS: IRS auditing mentioned, third-party auditing companies
VISUAL: Selo de aprovação, ícones de auditoria independente, representação visual de validação por terceiros credíveis
[01:53] Now, the other things that we could do, we can get independently audited. There's a lot of auditing companies out there, including the IRS, if you've ever been audited by the IRS, that essentially acts as like a stamp of approval, especially in the investment niche.
[02:08] Now, there's also a lot of thirdparty auditing companies that really don't cost that much.
[02:13] And what they do is they come in and they just simply audit your books. You know, they make sure that if, as an example, you're raising money that you're not putting it into the founders's personal accounts.
[02:24] you know, they make sure that you're actually putting it into a clearing house, as an example, or a brokerage that you have a broker dealer license with.
[02:32] U you know, they make sure that you're actually doing the things that you claim you're going to do and then they give you a stamp of approval.
[02:40] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Authority Hijacking Concept"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Conceito de "sequestro de autoridade" através de instituições credíveis, transferência de credibilidade de terceiros para a organização
[02:42] There's a lot of thirdparty auditing companies, once again, very credible institutions that have a lot of credibility that they can bring to your organization. We call that authority hijacking.
[02:53] So, I'd encourage once again, that when you look to overcome the specific objection that you attempt to do so through credibility assets, okay?
[03:02] Don't just try to use words. Try to build the trust through some type of third-party assets that show that you're legit.
